code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(tokens)
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("positive=#{count}")
